claimText: The University of Sydney Academic Integrity Policy 2022 treats inappropriate use of artificial intelligence to generate content for an assessment task as an academic integrity breach, and says submitting an AI-generated assessment may be considered contract cheating.

citation.citationTitle: Frequently asked questions about generative AI at Sydney
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
